passive.name: Deadly Venom
passive.description: Twitch's basic attacks infect the target, dealing true damage each second.

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Innate:}} {{cis|Twitch}} basic attacks apply stacks of ''Deadly Venom'' for a few seconds, which stacks up to a cap.
wiki_detail.blurb4: {{sbc|Deadly Venom:}} For each stack, the target is continually dealt {{as|true damage}}. This effect is considered a {{tip|poison}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Innate:}} '''Twitch's''' [[basic attack]]s {{tip|on-hit}} apply a [[stack]] of ''Deadly Venom'' for 6 seconds, refreshing on subsequent applications and stacking up to 6 times.
wiki_detail.description2: {{sbc|Deadly Venom:}} For each stack, the target is dealt{{ft|{{sti|true damage|{{as|{{pp|1 to 5 for 5|1 to 17|formula=1 every 4 levels}}|true damage}}}} {{as|(+ 3% AP)}} {{as|true damage}} per second over the duration,|{{sti|true damage|{{as|{{pp|1*6 to 5*6 for 5|1 to 17|formula=1 every 4 levels}}|true damage}}}} {{as|(+ {{#expr:3*6}}% AP)}} {{as|'''total''' true damage}} over the duration,}}for a maximum of{{ft|{{as|{{pp|1*6 to 5*6 for 5|1 to 17|formula=6 every 4 levels}}|true damage}} {{as|(+ {{#expr:3*6}}% AP)}} {{as|true damage}} with each tick.|{{as|{{pp|1*6*6 to 5*6*6 for 5|1 to 17|formula=6 every 4 levels}}|true damage}} {{as|(+ {{#expr:3*6*6}}% AP)}} {{as|'''total''' true damage}} over the duration.}}This effect is considered a {{tip|poison}}.
wiki_detail.notes:
* The first 5 stacks on a target are indicated each by a small mark around them, while a target affected by the maximum stacks of 6 is indicated by a single large mark above them instead.
* ''Deadly Venom'' does not affect [[structures]].
* Being applied on-hit, ''Deadly Venom'' stacks will still be applied if the attack was {{ai|Riposte|Fiora|parried}} or {{tip|blocked}}, but not if {{tip|dodged}} and/or missed if '''Twitch''' is {{tip|blind|blinded}}.

Q.name: Ambush
Q.description:
Twitch becomes Camouflaged for a short duration and gains Move Speed. When leaving Camouflage, Twitch gains Attack Speed for a short duration.

When an enemy champion with Deadly Venom dies, Ambush's cooldown is reset.
Q.tooltip:
Twitch Camouflages and gains {{ movespeedmod }}% Move Speed for {{ stealthduration }} seconds. The Move Speed increases to {{ hiddenspeed }}% while near an enemy champion that can't see him. After exiting Camouflage, Twitch gains {{ attackspeedmod*100 }}% Attack Speed for {{ attackspeedduration }} seconds.

When an enemy champion dies while afflicted with Venom, this Ability's Cooldown is refreshed.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Twitch}} becomes {{tip|camouflage|camouflaged}} for some time, gaining {{sti|ms|{{as|'''bonus''' movement speed}}}}, increased while facing enemy {{tip|champions}} that cannot see him.
wiki_detail.blurb2: Upon breaking stealth, '''Twitch''' gains {{sti|{{as|'''bonus''' attack speed}}}} for a few seconds.
wiki_detail.blurb3: When an enemy {{tip|champion}} dies while afflicted with ''{{ai|Deadly Venom|Twitch}}'', ''Ambush's'' cooldown is {{sti|cdr|reset}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} After a 1-second delay, '''Twitch''' becomes {{tip|camouflage|camouflaged}} for a duration. Attacking or casting ''{{ai|Venom Cask|Twitch}}'' or ''{{ai|Contaminate|Twitch}}'' ends ''Ambush'' immediately.
wiki_detail.description2: During this time, '''Twitch''' gains {{sti|ms|{{as|10% '''bonus''' movement speed}}}}, increased to {{as|30%|ms}} while facing enemy {{tip|champions}} within a 1000-unit radius who cannot see him.
wiki_detail.description3: Upon breaking stealth, '''Twitch''' gains {{sti|{{as|'''bonus''' attack speed}}}} for 5 seconds.
wiki_detail.description4: When an enemy {{tip|champion}} dies while afflicted with ''{{ai|Deadly Venom|Twitch}}'', ''Ambush's'' {{sti|cooldown}} is reset.
wiki_detail.notes:
* Entering stealth cancels '''Twitch's''' current basic attack.
* ''Ambush'' follows the same rules as stealth but he can still perform actions normally before entering {{tip|camouflage}}. Activating {{si|Recall}} during the 1-second delay allows him to {{tip|channel}} it while stealthed.
* If '''Twitch''' enters {{tip|stasis}} during the delay, he will gain the {{tip|camouflage}} after the stasis ends.
* Using a basic attack breaks the stealth at the start of the attack windup.
wiki_detail.flavorsound:
{{sm2|Twitch_Original_Q_3.ogg}} (Entering stealth) ''"Sneaky, sneaky... "''
{{sm2|Twitch_Original_QEnd_2.ogg}} (Exiting stealth) ''"I was hiding! Hehehahaa, grr!"

W.name: Venom Cask
W.description: Twitch hurls a cask of venom that explodes in an area, slowing targets and applying deadly venom to the target.
W.tooltip:
Twitch hurls a cask that adds a stack of Deadly Venom to all enemies struck and leaves behind a toxic cloud that persists for {{ duration }} seconds.

Enemies that remain within the cloud are Slowed by {{ totalslowamount }}% and receive an additional stack of Deadly Venom each second.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Twitch}} tosses a cask that explodes at the target location, inflicting ''{{ai|Deadly Venom|Twitch}}'' to enemies hit.
wiki_detail.blurb2: The area then becomes contaminated for a short time, which continually {{tip|slows}} enemies and inflicts ''{{ai|Deadly Venom|Twitch}}''.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Twitch''' hurls a cask of venom that explodes at the target location, applying ''{{ai|Deadly Venom|Twitch}}'' to enemies hit and granting {{tip|sight}} of the area.
wiki_detail.description2: The area then becomes contaminated for 3 seconds, applying a ''{{ai|Deadly Venom|Twitch}}'' stack each second to enemies within and {{tip|slow|slowing}} them.
wiki_detail.notes:
* ''Venom Cask'' can apply a maximum of 4 {{ai|Deadly Venom|Twitch}} stacks per enemy.
* ''Venom Cask's'' missile will fail to fire if '''Twitch''' is {{tip|suppression|suppressed}} during the cast time.{{bug|2}}

E.name: Contaminate
E.description: Twitch wreaks further havoc on poisoned enemies with a blast of his vile diseases.
E.tooltip:
Deals {{ basedamage }} physical damage to all nearby enemies affected by Deadly Venom, plus an additional {{ physicaldamageperstack }} physical damage and {{ magicdamageperstack }} magical damage per stack of Deadly Venom.

Max Damage: {{ maxphysicaldamage }} physical damage and {{ maxmagicdamage }} magical damage.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Twitch}} spreads a toxin to nearby enemies afflicted with ''{{ai|Deadly Venom|Twitch}}'', dealing {{as|physical damage}}. This deals additional {{as|physical|pdamage}} and {{as|magic damage}} based on stacks of ''{{ai|Deadly Venom|Twitch}}''.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Twitch''' sends out a lethal toxin to each nearby enemy afflicted by ''{{ai|Deadly Venom|Twitch}}'', dealing them {{as|physical damage}}.
wiki_detail.description2: ''Contaminate'' deals additional {{as|physical damage}} and {{as|30% AP}} {{as|magic damage}} for each stack of ''{{ai|Deadly Venom|Twitch}}'' on the target.
wiki_detail.leveling2: {{st|Physical Damage Per Stack|{{ap|15 to 35}} {{as|(+ 35% '''bonus''' AD)}}|Minimum Mixed Damage|{{ap|20+15 to 60+35}} {{as|(+ 35% '''bonus''' AD)}} {{as|(+ 30% AP)}}|Maximum Mixed Damage|{{ap|20+15*6 to 60+35*6}} {{as|(+ 210% '''bonus''' AD)}} {{as|(+ {{ap|30*6}}% AP)}}}}
wiki_detail.description3: ''A nearby enemy with {{ai|Deadly Venom|Twitch}} is required to cast this ability. The target does not have to be {{tip|sight|visible}} to be targeted by this ability.''
wiki_detail.notes:
* ''Contaminate'' will deal the additional damage to targets based on the number of {{ai|Deadly Venom|Twitch}} stacks they had at the start of the cast time.
* '''Twitch''' is given a range indicator for ''Contaminate's'' radius upon infecting an enemy champion with {{ai|Deadly Venom|Twitch}} (actual range is slightly larger than shown by the indicator).
* ''Contaminate'' will not deal damage to enemies that are not within range of the ability before the cast time completes.
** If the target moves out of range after the cast time, they are still dealt the damage.

R.name: Spray and Pray
R.description: Twitch unleashes the full power of his crossbow, shooting bolts over a great distance that pierce all enemies caught in their path.
R.tooltip:
Twitch unleashes his crossbow, gaining {{ bonusrange }} Attack Range and {{ bonusad }} Attack Damage, and causing his Attacks to become piercing bolts for {{ duration }} seconds. These bolts hit all enemies they pass through, but deal {{ falloffdamage*100 }}% less damage to subsequent targets, down to a minimum of {{ minimumfalloffdamage*100 }}% damage.
{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Twitch}} gains {{sti|{{as|'''bonus''' attack damage}}}} and {{sti|range|'''bonus''' attack range}} for a few seconds, during which his basic attacks are replaced with bolts that deal the {{as|attack's damage|AD}} to enemies hit.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Twitch''' gains {{sti|{{as|'''bonus''' attack damage}}}} and {{sti|range|300 '''bonus''' attack range}} for 6 seconds, during which his {{tip|basic attack|basic attacks}} are replaced by ''bolts'' that travel slightly further than his attack range in a straight line, dealing damage to {{tt|every enemy unit|non-champions and champions, wards and plants, turrets and structures}} hit.
wiki_detail.description2: The ''bolts'' deal {{pp|key=%|type=enemies hit|110-10*x|0 to 4 for 5|formula=100% - 10% per enemy hit. ''This is capped at 60% damage.''|changedisplay=true}} of the {{as|attack's damage|AD}}, apply {{tip|on-hit}} effects at 100% effectiveness, and can {{tip|critically strike}}.
wiki_detail.range: {{tip|er|icononly = true}} {{tt|1100|bolt travel distance, further increased by Rapid Firecannon}}
wiki_detail.spellshield:
|notes        = 
* The extra distance that the bolts travel scales with '''bonus''' attack range.
* ''Spray and Pray'' allows '''Twitch''' to outrange {{tip|turret|turrets}} by 50 units, allowing him to hit them without them returning fire.
* '''Twitch''' targets his line attack at his target's location at the ''start'' of his attack windup.
** The ''bolts'' reach targets at a delay, composed of '''Twitch's''' windup time and distance the ''bolt'' has to travel at finite speed. Even the primary target can dodge the attack if they are moving quickly enough.
* The ''bolt'' projectiles will naturally pass through terrain and enemy structures (the latter will be damaged by ''bolts'' even if they are not directly targeted).
* If '''Twitch''' is {{tip|blind|blinded}} before winding up the attack, the hits will ''miss'' against '''all''' targets.
* {{iis|Runaan's Hurricane}} {{nie|Wind's Fury}} interacts with ''Spray and Pray's'' {{sti|'''bonus''' attack range}} but not with the modified missile effect (the secondary bolts will not have pass-through effects).
* Whenever the ''bolts'' penetrate a target, a small elongated cloud appears at the location, which's VFX and SFX '''can''' be seen and heard inside the Fog of War.
* The ''bolts<nowiki>'</nowiki>'' travel distance scales with the full value of '''Twitch's''' {{sti|range|attack range}} increases such as {{ii|Rapid Firecannon}}, but not with size increases (which only increase his effective attack range, thereby the target range).
* (Outdated as of [[V10.13]], now can hit everything with edge range, except for turrets) The {{tip|cr|icononly = true}} center of a unit must be within the maximum travel distance of the ''bolt'' missile, and in front of the spawn location ('''Twitch's''' {{tip|cr|icononly = true}} center) for the ''bolt'' to be able to hit them.
** Other than this condition, the ''bolt'' missile has to only touch (pass within its half width of 60 units) the {{tip|er|icononly = true}} edge of the unit's radius.
** This is standard behaviour for ''linear skillshots''.
wiki_detail.tips: * {{iis|Runaan's Hurricane}} bolts can target the same units that are hit by '''Twitch's''' penetrated ''bolt'', increasing the total damage dealt to them and applying {{tip|on-hit}} effects twice.
